description.en: The full P4 Slimming System — MRT Complex + Shake Off Phyto Fiber. Everything you need to start your weight management journey.
description.sw: Mfumo kamili wa P4 wa kupunguza uzito — MRT Complex + Shake Off Phyto Fiber. Kila kitu unachohitaji kuanza safari yako ya usimamizi wa uzito.

description.en: Splina Chlorophyll + Hawaiian Spirulina — the ultimate daily detox and immunity stack.
description.sw: Splina Klorofili + Spirulina ya Hawaii — mchanganyiko bora wa kila siku wa kusafisha sumu na kinga.
